title: Project Timeline
scenario: Create a project timeline for a software development project. The timeline should include key milestones, start and end dates, and dependencies between tasks. The timeline should be generated in a JSON format and should be no more than 5KB in size.
constraints: Must be no more than 5KB in size
Must include start and end dates

evaluationCriteria.description: The timeline adheres to the constraints (size, milestones, dates)
The JSON syntax is correct and follows standard guidelines
The content is accurate and includes relevant information
